g.text: Metadata evaluation PRIOR to ANN traversal

ul.li: May return fewer than K results

div.p: THE NAVIGATION PROBLEM Pre-filtering removes graph edges. If the entry point or intermediate bridges are filtered, HNSW search terminates early.
FALLBACK: Pre-filter typically executes brute-force on the ID-set if selectivity is high.
